---
title: "Report: Dependencies of mixed4e_1x1_pre_relu_conv:55[31]"
unlisted: true
---

<img id="origin-cluster-photo-img" src="assets/mixed4e_1x1_pre_relu_conv/55/cluster_31.jpeg" alt="cid=31">
<div class="mt-1">
<button type="button" id="origin-cluster-photo-toggle" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary" data-combined-src="assets/mixed4e_1x1_pre_relu_conv/55/cluster_31.jpeg" data-pw-src="assets/mixed4e_1x1_pre_relu_conv/55/cluster_31_third.jpeg" data-showing-pw="false" onclick="var btn=this; var img=document.getElementById('origin-cluster-photo-img'); var showingPw=btn.dataset.showingPw==='true'; img.src=showingPw?btn.dataset.combinedSrc:btn.dataset.pwSrc; btn.dataset.showingPw=(!showingPw).toString(); btn.textContent=showingPw?'Show pointwise multiplication':'Show cluster photo';">Show pointwise multiplication</button>
</div>
</div>


::: {.text-body-secondary .small .mb-3}
- frequently firing dependency neurons: **114**
- one-off/outlier dependency neurons (fired in fewer than **11** of **104** collected input images, not shown below): **134**
:::


::: {layout-ncol=2}

![output activation, distance from noise_med (noise-radius units) — all](assets/output_activation_histogram_all.jpeg)

![per-example fraction of firings with noise-median distance > 0.8 (noise-radius units) — all](assets/fraction_above_threshold_histogram_all.jpeg)

:::


::: {layout-ncol=2}

![output activation, distance from noise_med (noise-radius units) — adding (contribution > 0)](assets/output_activation_histogram_adding.jpeg)

![per-example fraction of firings with noise-median distance > 0.8 (noise-radius units) — adding (contribution > 0)](assets/fraction_above_threshold_histogram_adding.jpeg)

:::


::: {layout-ncol=2}

![output activation, distance from noise_med (noise-radius units) — inhibiting (contribution <= 0)](assets/output_activation_histogram_inhibiting.jpeg)

![per-example fraction of firings with noise-median distance > 0.8 (noise-radius units) — inhibiting (contribution <= 0)](assets/fraction_above_threshold_histogram_inhibiting.jpeg)

:::

<div class="mb-2"><div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 mb-1"><div class="progress flex-grow-1" style="height: 6px;" role="progressbar" aria-valuenow="14.8" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100"><div class="progress-bar bg-primary" style="width: 14.8%;"></div></div><span class="text-body-secondary small">cid=6 · 8 (14.8%) · median_sim=0.44</span></div>

</div>

:::

</details>

:::
